info.title: NClient.DotNetTool
info.description: DotNet CLI tool for generate facades of NClient.

options.name: --api
options.description:
Required. The OpenAPI spec file to use. Paths are
relative to the project directory. You can also set
a http URI as path

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Default: ./Facades.cs) The result. File paths are
relative to the project directory.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
(Default: NClient.Facades) The namespace for
generated files.
